Page has no strong importance elements
Category: Content relevance
Pages that have no <strong> elements in the code. The <strong> HTML element indicates that its contents have strong importance, seriousness, or urgency. Browsers typically render the contents in bold type. Using this element you can manage user attention better and improve user engagement on the page.
https://guillaumelauzier.com/writing
